loyaltyMetaDescription: Member loyalty overview, discovery, and business detail surfaces.
accountHubTitle: Public self-service flows are now split from the future member session.
accountHubDescription: Registration, activation, and password recovery can move forward now. Full profile, addresses, and authenticated member navigation remain intentionally blocked on the final browser auth/session decision.
sessionStrategyNoteDescription: Login, profile editing, address book, orders, invoices, and loyalty remain behind the browser-session decision. This keeps Darwin.Web from hard-coding a token transport that the wider platform has not yet finalized.
cardSignInTitle: Sign in to the protected portal
cardSignInDescription: Use the provisional browser session layer to open profile, orders, invoices, and loyalty pages in the web portal.
cardRegisterDescription: Consumer self-service registration is now available directly against the member auth contract.
cardActivationDescription: The current backend activation lifecycle is now exposed in the storefront instead of staying implicit.
cardPasswordTitle: Request or complete a password reset
cardPasswordDescription: Password reset now stays on the public web route structure while still using the existing backend email/token flow.
registerDescription: This screen registers a member directly through the public member auth endpoint and then relies on the existing backend confirmation-email lifecycle.
registrationSubmittedMessage: The account was created. Check the email confirmation flow before expecting sign-in to succeed.
currentBoundaryRegistration: Registration is live, but browser sign-in persistence is still a separate decision.
currentBoundaryCommunication: Confirmation email behavior stays on the backend Communication Core path.
activationDescription: This route exposes the existing backend confirmation lifecycle to the storefront without inventing a web-only activation system.
activationRequestedMessage: If the account exists, the activation email has been requested through the current backend flow.
activationConfirmedMessage: The email confirmation request completed successfully. Browser sign-in is still a separate session decision.
activationEmailRequiredMessage: Email is required to request confirmation.
activationRequestFailedMessage: Activation email could not be requested.
activationEmailTokenRequiredMessage: Email and token are both required to confirm the account.
activationConfirmFailedMessage: Email confirmation could not be completed.
passwordRecoveryTitle: Request or complete a password reset
passwordRecoveryDescription: This route exposes the existing backend reset-token lifecycle and keeps the web client out of its own private reset implementation.
passwordRequestedMessage: If the account exists, the password-reset email has been requested through the current backend flow.
passwordResetMessage: The password reset completed successfully. Browser sign-in remains a separate session decision.
passwordRequestEmailRequiredMessage: Email is required to request a password reset.
passwordRequestFailedMessage: Password reset request could not be completed.
passwordResetFieldsRequiredMessage: Email, token, and new password are required.
signInDescription: This first browser-auth slice uses web-owned cookies to hold the member session while keeping all protected data behind the canonical member endpoints.
memberAuthHttpErrorMessage: The member auth request could not be completed.
memberAuthNetworkErrorMessage: Member auth API could not be reached.
memberSessionUnauthorizedMessage: The member session is no longer authorized.
memberResourceNotFoundMessage: The requested member resource was not found.
memberApiHttpErrorMessage: The member API request could not be completed.
memberApiInvalidPayloadMessage: The member API returned an invalid response payload.
memberApiNetworkErrorMessage: The member API could not be reached.
sessionNoteArchitecture: This is a provisional browser-session layer owned by Darwin.Web, not a permanent auth architecture decision.
sessionNoteApi: Orders, invoices, loyalty, and profile data still come only from Darwin.WebApi.
memberDataWarningsTitle: Some member data loaded with warnings.
memberDashboardDescription: This dashboard reads the authenticated member profile surfaces through the new web-owned browser session layer.
profileUnavailable: Profile data is not currently available for this member session.
preferencesUnavailable: Preference data is not currently available for this member session.
crmContextUnavailable: No linked CRM customer context is currently available.
profileUpdatedMessage: The member profile was saved through the canonical profile endpoint.
profileNeedsAttentionMessage: The member profile endpoint returned status "{status}".
noProfileEditMessage: No profile snapshot is currently available for editing.
boundaryProfileMessage: Email remains display-only here. This page only edits the fields exposed by the canonical member profile contract.
phoneVerificationTitle: Keep phone status aligned with the canonical profile contract
memberPaymentHandoffMissingUrlMessage: Hosted checkout URL was not returned.
memberPaymentHandoffHttpErrorMessage: The payment handoff request could not be completed.
memberPaymentHandoffUnreachableMessage: The payment handoff endpoint could not be reached.
profileRequiredFieldsMessage: Profile update is missing required fields.
preferencesRowVersionRequiredMessage: Preference update requires a row version.
phoneAlreadyVerifiedMessage: This member profile is already marked as phone-number confirmed.
phoneCodeRequestedMessage: The backend accepted the phone verification request. The member should receive a code through the selected channel.
phoneVerifiedMessage: The verification code was accepted and the member profile should now reflect a confirmed phone number.
phoneVerificationUnavailable: Phone verification becomes available once the member profile can be loaded.
preferencesUpdatedMessage: The member preference snapshot was saved through the canonical profile endpoint.
preferencesNeedsAttentionMessage: The member preferences endpoint returned status "{status}".
noPreferencesEditMessage: No preference snapshot is currently available for editing.
currentContractPreferencesMessage: These switches map directly to the current member preference contract. More granular communication controls can be layered later when Communication Core grows.
addressBookWarningsMessage: The member addresses endpoint returned status "{status}".
addressUpdateIdentifiersMessage: Address update requires id and row version.
addressDeleteIdentifiersMessage: Address delete requires id and row version.
noSavedAddressesMessage: No saved addresses are currently available for this member.
loyaltyOverviewTitleSignedIn: Loyalty overview now spans joined businesses and public discovery
loyaltyOverviewTitleSignedOut: Loyalty discovery is available before a member joins
loyaltyOverviewDescriptionSignedIn: Joined-business dashboards still come from the authenticated member contracts, while discovery and pre-join business context now come from the public business contracts.
loyaltyOverviewDescriptionSignedOut: Anonymous visitors can browse loyalty-ready businesses first, then sign in only when they want to join a program or access member-only balance and history screens.
myLoyaltyPlacesDescription: Business-aware cards now come from the joined-loyalty places contract instead of only relying on aggregate account stats.
noJoinedLoyaltyPlacesMessage: No joined loyalty places were returned for this page.
noLoyaltyOverviewMessage: No loyalty overview could be loaded for the current member session.
memberOnlySurfacesDescription: Balances, joined-business dashboards, rewards history, promotions, orders, and invoices still require member sign-in.
publicBusinessDetailFallback: This business detail now reads from the public business contract, so discovery and pre-join loyalty UX can stay on the canonical platform surface.
businessDetailWarningsMessage: Business detail status: {status}. Public loyalty discovery remains visible instead of collapsing into a blank route.
loyaltyMembershipCreatedMessage: The canonical member join contract completed. This route should now fall through to the full member dashboard on reload.
programSnapshotDescription: Reward tiers now come from the public loyalty-program contract, so pre-join storefront UX can explain value before the member enrolls.
noActiveLoyaltyProgramMessage: No active public loyalty program was returned for this business.
noPublicRewardTiersMessage: No public reward tiers are currently published for this business.
noPublicContactMetadataMessage: No richer public contact metadata was returned for this business.
noPublicBranchListMessage: No public branch list is currently available for this business.
joinReadinessAuthenticated: You can create the loyalty account directly from this page.
joinReadinessAnonymous: Sign in first to create a loyalty account for this business.
joinReadinessContractNote: The join action uses the canonical member loyalty contract and does not depend on WebAdmin DTOs or a web-local enrollment workflow.
discoveryDescriptionDefault: Public discovery now uses the canonical business-discovery contracts and keeps loyalty-ready businesses visible even before the member joins.
discoveryDescriptionSignedIn: The joined-business list remains member-specific, but discovery now stays visible so the portal can also act as a growth surface for the next place the customer wants to join.
discoveryDescriptionSignedOut: This discovery list is public and contract-driven, so storefront visitors can inspect businesses and reward tiers before authenticating.
joinWithoutBranchSelection: Join without selecting a preferred branch
discoveryWarningsMessage: Discovery status: {status}. Public loyalty discovery should remain observable instead of silently disappearing.
mapPreviewUnavailableMessage: No coordinate-aware businesses were returned for the current discovery result, so map preview is unavailable.
proximityModeMessage: Discovery list ranking now uses the current latitude/longitude and radius when they are valid. The visual map preview below is rendered from the same discovery result set so loyalty-only filtering stays consistent.
publicBusinessDetailCardFallback: Public business detail is available for this loyalty place.
noDiscoveryMatchesMessage: No loyalty-ready businesses matched the current filters.
promotionTrackedMessage: The promotion interaction was sent through the canonical member promotions tracking contract.
promotionTrackingFailedMessage: Promotion interaction could not be recorded.
scanPreparedMessage: A short-lived browser scan token is now ready for this business and can be used for accrual or redemption handoff.
scanClearedMessage: The browser-owned scan preparation state was removed for this business.
loyaltyJoinFailedMessage: Loyalty enrollment could not be completed.
scanRewardSelectionRequiredMessage: Choose at least one reward before preparing a redemption scan.
scanPrepareFailedMessage: Scan session could not be prepared.
noBusinessDashboardMessage: No business-scoped loyalty dashboard could be loaded for this business.
pointsNeededNextRewardMessage: {value} more points needed to unlock the next reward.
noAdditionalRewardThresholdMessage: No additional reward threshold is currently published for this account.
pointExpiryInactiveMessage: Point expiry tracking is not currently active for this loyalty program.
browserScanPrepDescription: This web flow now calls the canonical member scan-preparation endpoint. The returned token stays in a short-lived web cookie instead of leaking into the URL.
accrualModeDescription: Prepare a scan that earns points during checkout or an in-store visit.
redemptionModeDescription: Prepare a scan for spending points on one or more currently redeemable rewards.
inferBranchOption: Let the backend infer the branch
noRedeemableRewardsMessage: No redeemable rewards are currently available, so the browser scan flow is effectively accrual-only right now.
scanTokenNote: This QR code is rendered from the canonical short-lived scan token. The token still stays out of the URL and remains browser-local until it expires or is cleared.
noActiveScanTokenMessage: No active browser-prepared scan token exists for this business yet.
noPublishedRewardsMessage: No published rewards are currently available for this business.
promotionsDescription: Personalized promotion cards now read from the canonical member promotions feed for this business.
noPromotionCardsMessage: No promotion cards are currently available for this business.
unifiedTimelineDescription: Recent loyalty events across points transactions and reward redemptions.
noTimelineEntriesMessage: No recent loyalty timeline entries are currently available for this business.
noRecentTransactionsMessage: No recent transactions are currently available for this business.
ordersAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for order history.
ordersAuthRequiredMessage: Orders now live behind the authenticated member portal and no longer use a storefront placeholder route.
orderDetailAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for order detail.
orderDetailAuthRequiredMessage: Order detail is now an authenticated member route.
profileAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for profile editing.
profileAuthRequiredMessage: Profile editing now lives behind the authenticated member portal.
preferencesAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for preference editing.
preferencesAuthRequiredMessage: Member preferences now live behind the authenticated portal.
addressesAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for address management.
addressesAuthRequiredMessage: Reusable addresses now live behind the authenticated portal.
invoicesAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for invoice history.
invoicesAuthRequiredMessage: Invoices now live behind the authenticated member portal and no longer use a placeholder route.
invoiceDetailAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for invoice detail.
invoiceDetailAuthRequiredMessage: Invoice detail is now an authenticated member route.
ordersTitle: Order history now reads from the authenticated member portal surface
ordersWarningsMessage: The member orders endpoint returned status "{status}".
noOrdersMessage: No member orders were returned for this history page.
orderDetailUnavailableMessage: The member order endpoint returned status "{status}".
noOrderPaymentsMessage: No payment attempts are attached to this order yet.
noShipmentsMessage: No shipment snapshots are currently attached to this order.
linkedInvoicesDescription: Order-linked invoice snapshots now come directly from the member order detail contract.
noLinkedInvoicesMessage: No linked invoices are currently attached to this order.
invoicesTitle: Invoice history now reads from the authenticated member billing surface
invoicesWarningsMessage: The member invoices endpoint returned status "{status}".
noInvoicesMessage: No member invoices were returned for this history page.
invoiceDetailUnavailableMessage: The member invoice endpoint returned status "{status}".
paymentSummaryDescription: Billing presentation now consumes the canonical summary fields and document link exposed by the member invoice contract.
